title: Don’t Tell Anyone, Okay? - NSFW Stream
description:
A combination puzzle game where you smash the same foods together to evolve them into bigger ones!!

CG scenes—including the “Finish” animation—are already implemented!!

Enjoy full voice acting and super-smooth animations!!

How to Play• Combine identical foods to evolve them into larger foods.

• Completing the final food item will unlock a CG event.

• Once unlocked, the CG can be viewed as many times as you like.

• Take your time to fully enjoy the CG event.
description_short: A combination puzzle game where you smash the same foods together to evolve them into bigger ones!! CG scenes—including the “Finish” animation—are already implemented!! Enjoy full voice acting and super-smooth animations!!
